what: Add `shared_link_id`, `viewer_label` to `exports` so share-link comparison downloads can be distinguished from owner exports.
affectedRecords: All rows in `exports`. Already applied to prod.
rollback: `ALTER TABLE exports DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS exports_shared_link_id_shared_links_id_fk; ALTER TABLE exports DROP COLUMN shared_link_id, DROP COLUMN viewer_label`. Pre-beta code does not read these columns.
window: `inline`. Already applied; further runs are no-ops.
